---
title: "Penelope Anne Laura Packe"
---

## Penelope Anne Laura Packe

**Dates:** (b.1848-1927)

**Maiden name:** (Cator, afterwards Lennard)

### Description

ward of Anne Sturges Bourne

### Biography

She and her sister Laura were daughters of John Farnaby Cator (1816-1899), who assumed the surname Lennard and was created 1st Bt. in 1880.  Their mother was his first wife Laura Golding (d.1850), who was cousin to Anne Sturges Bourne.  Penelope Lennard married (1875) William Packe (d. 1880).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 29th 1900
- [To Penelope Anne Laura Packe, April 18th 1899](../letters/3405_To_Penelope_Anne_Laura_Packe.html)
- Letter from Decr 14th 1891

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
